creator: gallasch@free.de
text:
Just wanted to add:

I succeeded in installing a 9-STABLE snapshot =
(FreeBSD-9.0-RELENG_9-20120328) on my HP/Compaq DL385 G2 server.
With 9.0 RELEASE it showed the same problem "Root mount waiting for: =
usbus1 usbus0" as my old DL145 G3.

If there was a regression in USB code in 9.0 RELEASE it seems to have =
vanished by now in the 9-STABLE branch.

I cannot confirm this for my DL145 G3 as this crappy hardware died =
unexpectedly.

So if anybody following this PR had the same USB trouble installing 9.0 =
RELEASE would be so kind to retry the install with a few days old =
9-STABLE snapshot - just to confirm that the install is now possible =
with 9-STABLE - that would be great!

You can download fresh 9-STABLE snapshots from the allbsd ftp server[1].

Regards,
Kai.

[1] ftp://ftp.allbsd.org/pub/FreeBSD-snapshots/amd64-amd64/
